title: Daggers and the minecraft movie like portal
description: This mod adds daggers and the minecraft movie portal made out of blackstone.
body: This mod adds Daggers and the minecraft movie like portal. There are 7 types of daggers-wood,stone,iron,gold,steel,diamond and netherite. It also adds an hellish like dimension and an creative only boss. The boss is creative-only for now. It also adds steel, galvanized square steel as an item, block and weapon.
